Local Business/Campaign Spotlight We Three Bears - Personalised Baby Clothing, Gifts & Accessories 2 December 2024 I visited We Three Bears who are based in Attleborough. They recently opened their shop at 10 Church Street where they make specialised personalised gifts and clothing for babies, children and adults. Business Spotlight – Hannah Art 30 November 2023 One of the joys of my weekly constituency visits is getting to meet inspirational people – which is why it is such a delight for me to spotlight ‘Hannah Art’, the wonderful business set up by fourteen year old Hannah Fewell, whom I recently met at Banham Zoo’s brilliant ‘Christmas Enterprise Festival’. Cranswick Country Foods – Vacancies 14 June 2023 Further to the brilliant Wayland Chamber of Commerce Jobs Fair in Watton that I helped support with local councillors and the DWP, I am delighted to helped showcase some of the local job opportunities on offer right here in Mid Norfolk. Watton Jobs Fair – Friday 2nd June – 10am-2pm – Queens Memorial Hall, Watton Are you an upcoming school leaver, someone in search of a job, or even someone just looking for a new exciting career or opportunity? Are you a local business interested in speaking to LOCAL people about opportunities in their area. Then Wayland Chamber of Commerce want to hear from YOU! Mid Norfolk Railway – Emergency ‘Back On Track’ Appeal 28 March 2023 The ’Back On Track’ Emergency Appeal aims to raise £95,000 that, when combined with the funds already raised by the MNR, will hopefully allow the railway to reopen on a staged basis from the summer. Norwich Jobs Fair Looking to get back into work or change your career? The Norwich Jobs Fair will be taking place between 10am-1pm on Wednesday 13th July at the Forum in the Norwich. No registration is required. You can just turn up and talk to companies from various sectors and industries. It is completely free to come along Wymondham Food and Drink Festival 2022 Wymondham Food and Drink Festival 2022 will take place on Sunday 26th June between 10am-4pm.
